targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS detections FROM detections WHERE strftime('%s', timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND confidence >= $min_confidence AND is_false_positive = 0
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS detections FROM detections WHERE strftime('%s', timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND confidence >= $min_confidence AND is_false_positive = 0

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS today FROM detections WHERE date(timestamp) = date('now','localtime') AND is_false_positive = 0
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS today FROM detections WHERE date(timestamp) = date('now','localtime') AND is_false_positive = 0

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT species_id) AS species FROM detections WHERE strftime('%s', timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND is_false_positive = 0
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT species_id) AS species FROM detections WHERE strftime('%s', timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND is_false_positive = 0

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT s.common_name AS species FROM detections d JOIN species s ON s.id = d.species_id WHERE date(d.timestamp) = date('now','localtime') AND d.is_false_positive = 0 GROUP BY d.species_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
targets.queryText: SELECT s.common_name AS species FROM detections d JOIN species s ON s.id = d.species_id WHERE date(d.timestamp) = date('now','localtime') AND d.is_false_positive = 0 GROUP BY d.species_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT AVG(confidence) AS avg_conf FROM detections WHERE strftime('%s', timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND is_false_positive = 0
targets.queryText: SELECT AVG(confidence) AS avg_conf FROM detections WHERE strftime('%s', timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND is_false_positive = 0

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM detections WHERE is_false_positive = 0
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM detections WHERE is_false_positive = 0

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', timestamp) AS INTEGER) / $bucket * $bucket AS time, COUNT(*) AS detections FROM detections WHERE strftime('%s', timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND confidence >= $min_confidence AND is_false_positive = 0 GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', timestamp) AS INTEGER) / $bucket * $bucket AS time, COUNT(*) AS detections FROM detections WHERE strftime('%s', timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND confidence >= $min_confidence AND is_false_positive = 0 GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

targets.rawQueryText: WITH top AS (SELECT species_id FROM detections WHERE strftime('%s', timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND confidence >= $min_confidence AND is_false_positive = 0 GROUP BY species_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT $top_n) SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', d.timestamp) AS INTEGER) / $bucket * $bucket AS time, s.common_name AS series, COUNT(*) AS detections FROM detections d JOIN species s ON s.id = d.species_id WHERE strftime('%s', d.timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND d.confidence >= $min_confidence AND d.is_false_positive = 0 AND d.species_id IN (SELECT species_id FROM top) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: WITH top AS (SELECT species_id FROM detections WHERE strftime('%s', timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND confidence >= $min_confidence AND is_false_positive = 0 GROUP BY species_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT $top_n) SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', d.timestamp) AS INTEGER) / $bucket * $bucket AS time, s.common_name AS series, COUNT(*) AS detections FROM detections d JOIN species s ON s.id = d.species_id WHERE strftime('%s', d.timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND d.confidence >= $min_confidence AND d.is_false_positive = 0 AND d.species_id IN (SELECT species_id FROM top) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

panels.title: Activity by hour of day vs day of week

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%w', timestamp, 'localtime') AS INTEGER) AS dow, CAST(strftime('%H', timestamp, 'localtime') AS INTEGER) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS detections FROM detections WHERE strftime('%s', timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND is_false_positive = 0 GROUP BY dow, hour ORDER BY dow, hour
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%w', timestamp, 'localtime') AS INTEGER) AS dow, CAST(strftime('%H', timestamp, 'localtime') AS INTEGER) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS detections FROM detections WHERE strftime('%s', timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND is_false_positive = 0 GROUP BY dow, hour ORDER BY dow, hour

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT s.common_name AS species, s.scientific_name AS scientific, COUNT(*) AS detections, AVG(d.confidence) AS avg_confidence, MAX(d.timestamp) AS last_seen FROM detections d JOIN species s ON s.id = d.species_id WHERE strftime('%s', d.timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND d.is_false_positive = 0 GROUP BY d.species_id ORDER BY detections DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT s.common_name AS species, s.scientific_name AS scientific, COUNT(*) AS detections, AVG(d.confidence) AS avg_confidence, MAX(d.timestamp) AS last_seen FROM detections d JOIN species s ON s.id = d.species_id WHERE strftime('%s', d.timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND d.is_false_positive = 0 GROUP BY d.species_id ORDER BY detections DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT s.common_name AS species, COUNT(*) AS detections FROM detections d JOIN species s ON s.id = d.species_id WHERE strftime('%s', d.timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND d.is_false_positive = 0 GROUP BY d.species_id ORDER BY detections DESC LIMIT $top_n
targets.queryText: SELECT s.common_name AS species, COUNT(*) AS detections FROM detections d JOIN species s ON s.id = d.species_id WHERE strftime('%s', d.timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND d.is_false_positive = 0 GROUP BY d.species_id ORDER BY detections DESC LIMIT $top_n

targets.rawQueryText: WITH daily AS (SELECT date(d.timestamp,'localtime') AS day, d.species_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM detections d WHERE strftime('%s', d.timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND d.is_false_positive = 0 GROUP BY day, d.species_id), ranked AS (SELECT day, species_id, cnt, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY day ORDER BY cnt DESC) AS rk FROM daily) SELECT r.day, s.common_name AS winner, r.cnt AS detections FROM ranked r JOIN species s ON s.id = r.species_id WHERE r.rk = 1 ORDER BY r.day DESC
targets.queryText: WITH daily AS (SELECT date(d.timestamp,'localtime') AS day, d.species_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM detections d WHERE strftime('%s', d.timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND d.is_false_positive = 0 GROUP BY day, d.species_id), ranked AS (SELECT day, species_id, cnt, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY day ORDER BY cnt DESC) AS rk FROM daily) SELECT r.day, s.common_name AS winner, r.cnt AS detections FROM ranked r JOIN species s ON s.id = r.species_id WHERE r.rk = 1 ORDER BY r.day DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT s.common_name AS species, COUNT(*) AS detections, MIN(d.timestamp) AS first_seen, MAX(d.timestamp) AS last_seen FROM detections d JOIN species s ON s.id = d.species_id WHERE strftime('%s', d.timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND d.is_false_positive = 0 GROUP BY d.species_id HAVING detections < 5 ORDER BY detections ASC, last_seen DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT s.common_name AS species, COUNT(*) AS detections, MIN(d.timestamp) AS first_seen, MAX(d.timestamp) AS last_seen FROM detections d JOIN species s ON s.id = d.species_id WHERE strftime('%s', d.timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND d.is_false_positive = 0 GROUP BY d.species_id HAVING detections < 5 ORDER BY detections ASC, last_seen DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT confidence FROM detections WHERE strftime('%s', timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND is_false_positive = 0
targets.queryText: SELECT confidence FROM detections WHERE strftime('%s', timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND is_false_positive = 0

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', timestamp) AS INTEGER) / $bucket * $bucket AS time, AVG(CASE WHEN is_false_positive = 1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS fp_rate FROM detections WHERE strftime('%s', timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND reviewed = 1 GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', timestamp) AS INTEGER) / $bucket * $bucket AS time, AVG(CASE WHEN is_false_positive = 1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS fp_rate FROM detections WHERE strftime('%s', timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND reviewed = 1 GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN reviewed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS reviewed_pct FROM detections WHERE strftime('%s', timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN reviewed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS reviewed_pct FROM detections WHERE strftime('%s', timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(classifier_model,'(none)') AS model, COUNT(*) AS detections, AVG(confidence) AS avg_conf FROM detections WHERE strftime('%s', timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to GROUP BY classifier_model ORDER BY detections DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(classifier_model,'(none)') AS model, COUNT(*) AS detections, AVG(confidence) AS avg_conf FROM detections WHERE strftime('%s', timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to GROUP BY classifier_model ORDER BY detections DESC

panels.title: Selected detection (click a row in the table)

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT d.id AS id, s.common_name || ' — ' || printf('%.2f', d.confidence) || ' — ' || d.timestamp AS label FROM detections d JOIN species s ON s.id = d.species_id WHERE ($selected_id = 0 OR d.id = $selected_id) AND d.is_false_positive = 0 ORDER BY d.timestamp DESC LIMIT 1
targets.queryText: SELECT d.id AS id, s.common_name || ' — ' || printf('%.2f', d.confidence) || ' — ' || d.timestamp AS label FROM detections d JOIN species s ON s.id = d.species_id WHERE ($selected_id = 0 OR d.id = $selected_id) AND d.is_false_positive = 0 ORDER BY d.timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

value.title: Show this detection in the Selected panel

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT '▶ Show' AS pick, d.id AS detection_id, CAST(strftime('%s', d.timestamp) AS INTEGER) * 1000 AS time, s.common_name AS species, d.confidence AS confidence, '/api/detections/' || d.id || '/crop' AS crop, '/api/detections/' || d.id || '/annotated' AS frame FROM detections d JOIN species s ON s.id = d.species_id WHERE strftime('%s', d.timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND d.confidence >= $min_confidence AND d.is_false_positive = 0 ORDER BY d.timestamp DESC LIMIT 100
targets.queryText: SELECT '▶ Show' AS pick, d.id AS detection_id, CAST(strftime('%s', d.timestamp) AS INTEGER) * 1000 AS time, s.common_name AS species, d.confidence AS confidence, '/api/detections/' || d.id || '/crop' AS crop, '/api/detections/' || d.id || '/annotated' AS frame FROM detections d JOIN species s ON s.id = d.species_id WHERE strftime('%s', d.timestamp) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to AND d.confidence >= $min_confidence AND d.is_false_positive = 0 ORDER BY d.timestamp DESC LIMIT 100
